title: wulfenia ageria
intro: Wulfenia carinthiaca, also known as Wulfenia ageria, is a species of flowering plant in the family Campanulaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Central Europe and is known for its medicinal properties. The plant has been traditionally used to treat various health issues, including inflammation, digestive problems, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. It can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is also used in herbal supplements, offering relief from coughs, colds, and other health conditions.
